TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_J_J_Anderson, title = J_J_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/J_J_Anderson} }

S.FORM: J. J. Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1960, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 9, J. J. Anderson, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya J. J. Anderson, t'aring kawas tay 1978 tehuk kawas tay 1982, mqwas biru sa Bradley pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

J. J. Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1960, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 9, J. J. Anderson, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya J. J. Anderson, t'aring kawas tay 1978 tehuk kawas tay 1982, mqwas biru sa Bradley pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
